non_emergency_routing_rules: Non-emergency calls (scheduling inspections, pricing, general questions) are handled the next day during business hours; after hours, they can leave a message.
integration_constraints: never create sprinkler jobs in ServiceTrade without getting verbal approval from the technician first.
after_hours_flow_summary: Currently, after-hours emergency calls (sprinkler leaks, fire alarms) go to voicemail, causing customer panic. After-hours non-emergency calls (scheduling inspections, pricing, general questions) also go to voicemail.
notes: Apex Fire Protection specializes in fire suppression, sprinkler systems, and alarm monitoring. Their primary concern is inefficient handling of after-hours emergency calls, which currently go to voicemail instead of an on-call technician.
